asset.altsTitle: SHOTS tab: kụkwa melie ndị na-abụ alụ (mepụta gara aga) nke egwu kwa ọ. Dọtụ otu n'ime iji jide alụ a.

audio.continuousTitle: Row ntị na-aga gaa na clip na-esoro (guzobe = otu clip naanị)
audio.createVoiceTitle: Klona olu: bịanye mkpuchi mkpụrụ ike (mp3/wav/m4a/mp4) wee OmniVoice mepụta profaela ị nwere ike inyeghachi onye.
audio.generateSfxTitle: Jisie LLM mpaghara iji gụ script dị ka radio play na tụbuo mmetụta olu — na-ahụ kit ị nwere. Tinyegasị ha n'elu timeline na itinye.
audio.preCacheTitle: Bịanye audio niile nke episode a n'ime browser ka ntị ume bụrụ ihe ngwa ngwa na Cloudflare proxy
audio.sectionSubtitle: / maka ọ bụla ndiyipụ · tugbuo SFX n'etiti ndiyipụ
audio.selectCueHint: Horo ndiyipụ n'aka aka iji hụ metadata ya zuru ezu.
audio.voicesTitle: Nye olu a klonworo ahịhị onye mmadụ (dee manifest.voice.speaker_map).
createvoice.doneFooterNote: Tinye ya n'onye ama ihe na ihe ngosi nke Voice Roster / manifest iji jiri ya maka VO.
createvoice.footerNote: Akpụ via OmniVoice na 2080 Ti. Nkiti na-atụmatụm na 24kHz mono. Olu aha nkọwa na-ewepu.
createvoice.hintRefClip: (mp3 / wav / m4a / mp4 — n'ole ole sekaụndu dị ọcha nke olu ọtụtụ)
createvoice.hintTestLine: (ndị na-agbaghara — na-emepụta ọmụmụ ka ọ dị mma ka akpụ)
createvoice.placeholderTestLine: Hanya na tupu maka ụzọ nyocha adịghị.
createvoice.title: MEPỤTA OLU
createvoice.workingMsg: Na-amalite OmniVoice (akpụ mbụ nke session enwere ike ịkwu ruo ~3 min iji na-etem GPU) na akpụ… guzotuo ike na ọnụ a.
diagnostics.preflightNote: Nke a na-agba preflight (<0>{cmd}</0>) na host. Ọ naanụ lelee — ọ jighi ihapụ ihe ọ bụla.
diagnostics.title: Nyocha Nhazi Igwe
docs.editorHint: UTF-8 · markdown · LF · Ctrl/Cmd+S ka ibutu
docs.sharedBadgeTitle: A na-ekerịta n'ofe ihe ngosi zuru oke
docs.sharedEditorTitle: Emeghari nke a na-emeghari ya maka ihe ngosi niile
dopesheet.continuousTitle: Row ntị na-aga gaa na clip na-esoro (guzobe = otu clip naanị)
dopesheet.dragHint: / tugbuo kaad site n'elu timeline drawer n'elu ndiyipụ
dopesheet.title: DOPESHEET
filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.one: Bubata nke a wetara {n} olu dika eghere ihe. Isọnụ ya ọzọ na-ewutu ya na OmniVoice nke igwe na-ewughachi ihe ngosi ndị {show} si na ya. O bilitere OmniVoice ma jiri GPU (~sekọnd ole na ole kwa olu). I nwere ike ime ya emechaa site na onye ọkọ olu.
filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.other: Bubata nke a wetara {n} olu dika eghere ihe. Isọnụ ha ọzọ na-ewutu ha na OmniVoice nke igwe na-ewughachi ihe ngosi ndị {show} si na ha. O bilitere OmniVoice ma jiri GPU (~sekọnd ole na ole kwa olu). I nwere ike ime ha emechaa site na onye ọkọ olu.
filemenu.cloneVoicesFailed: Emelitere: {names}. Gee ma ọzọ site na onye ọkọ olu ka OmniVoice zuo okwu.
filemenu.exportAssetsCheckbox: Tinye ihe (olu, SFX, egwu) — zip nnukwu
filemenu.exportBody: Ọ na-ariko ọdinaya nke ihe ngosi (script, manifest, youtube) + ihe echiche nke kaadi okwu. Na ihe ngosi, ọ na-ariko binary source manifest na-ezo — OmniVoice olu reference clips, SFX, na egwu — tinyere catalog nke ibibi, yabụ onye natara nwere ike bubata ya ma pịa nbutton ndị regenerate. Ihe emesịrị (rụ egbe video / final mp4) ejighi na ya.
filemenu.exportVoiceHint: (A naanụ olu I nwere ike budata site n'okpuru Audio page's voice picker.)
filemenu.newEpisodeHint: Ẹdọ na-eme manifest + script malitere site na ndọda nke ihe ngosi a. Mgbe ahụ dee script ma pịa Generate manifest.
filemenu.folderBody: Studio enweghị ike imeghe onye njikwa faịlụ na igwe Studio na-agbapụta — ị nwere ike ilele site n'igwe ọzọ, ma ọ bụ server na-enweghị ihu. Faịlụ ihe ngosi ndị a bi na ụzọ a na igwe Studio:
filemenu.folderWindowsHint: Site na Windows, tinye nke a n'ime File Explorer:
filemenu.newShowHint: Nkebi ga-ebi na folder ohuru. Olu/rụta ihe ndi ndọda-edọ-emụkọ-ohere site na ihe ngosi ndọda — mezie ha n'okpuru Settings → Show metadata.
filemenu.shutdownBody: Nke a napụrụ GPU — ọ mechi ComfyUI, OmniVoice, na Ollama igbe — ma mechi ogbakọ serve. Iji Studio ọzọ ga-adị gị ụfọdụ ka ị malite ya site na terminal (<0>{cmd}</0>, ma ọ bụ systemd service).
filemenu.shuttingDown: MACU Studio na-enwepu GPU ma na-emelite…
filemenu.shuttingDownBody: I nwere ike mechi tab browser nke a ugbua. Malite Studio ọzọ site na terminal mgbe ị chọrọ ịlaghachi.
graphics.bespokeCardDesc: nke a bụ onye ode dị ka nkọwa, mma site na ihe nzọpụta nhazi, n'ihi ya enweghị ọkwa nlabada. Họrọ nhazi n'okpuru + mejupụta ederede iji mee ya nlabada (ma ọ bụ hazi nhazi ọhụrụ nwere AI).
graphics.bespokeHint: Egosipụtara "Kwadoo" (mma "Regen") n'ihi na ụlọ ihe a bụ onye ode dị ka nkọwa, mma site n'nhazi nlabada. Kwadoo ya otu ogidi iji mee ya Regen-able.
graphics.briefPlaceholder: mf. Crater Bowl scoreboard: SECTOR NI SLAGS vs SECTOR ANỌ GLOWBOYS, nnukwu ụka ọnụ na-emegharị 2 → 1, 'PLAYERS REMAINING' n'okpuru
graphics.cantRenameHint: — enweghị ike ibara aha ọzọ; mee ụlọ ihe ọhụrụ iji gbanwee id.
graphics.cardBlurb.freshTitle: Ihe ngosi karịa n'ụbọchị (setịpụ mmalite). AI na-ede ahịrị isi abụọ (mkpọ, n'ihu ihe, na-akpata nchegbu) + kicker + logline site n'ihe ọkọ.
graphics.cardBlurb.macuTitle: Ihe ngosi nkuzi mara mma (setịpụ mmalite). Akara akwụkwọ agbakwunyere na "THE MACU / REPORT"; AI na-ede naanị mpaghara na steshen-id sub.
graphics.cardBlurb.weather: Ụdịọrụ ihu igwe (setịpụ ihu igwe). Ihe ngosi ihu igwe na-adịghị mma mma.
graphics.cardConfigureTitle: Kwadoo — ụlọ ihe a enweghị nhazi nlabada; tụkwasị ya iji mee ya regen-able
graphics.cardRegenTitle: Regen — mepụta site na nhazi nzọpụta na ọkwa nlabada
graphics.cardTypeLabel: ụdị ụlọ ihe (maka ihe ngwa ihe AI)
graphics.cardTypeNote: Ụdị ụlọ ihe naanị ọ dị mkpa ọ bụrụ na ị pịa "Ede ederede nwere AI" — ọ na-achy olu, ole ọkwa na-ede, na na-akpọnyere nhazi n'ụdị ụlọ ihe a. Ide ọkwa gị na-ada onwe gị.
graphics.compGeneratedSuccess: nhazi "{key}" mepụta na họrọ elu — ugbu a mejupụta ederede n'usoro 3.
graphics.configureBtnTitle: Ụlọ ihe a enweghị nhazi/ederede nzọpụta — tụkwasị ha otu ogidi, mgbe ahụ ọ bụrụ Regen-able
graphics.createPendingBriefTitle: Ị degara nkọwa n'usoro 2 — pịa 'Mepụta nhazi' mbu, ma ọ bụ clear nkọwa iji jide nhazi ya
graphics.designWithAiHelp: Naanị ọ dị mkpa mgbe enweghị nhazi dị elu. Kọwa ụlọ ihe; ihe ngwa ihe mpaghara nkọwa na Qwen na-ede HyperFrames nhazi ọhụrụ na-nzọpụta ya n'okpụ aha site n'usoro 1. Ị ga-adịghị mejupụta ederede n'usoro 3.
graphics.designWithAiSummary: ✨ ma ọ bụ hazi nhazi ọhụrụ nwere AI
graphics.editBtnTitle: Dezie nhazi ma ọ bụ ederede ụlọ ihe a, mgbe ahụ mepụta
graphics.editModalFooterHint: Nzọpụta mgbagọ gị na mepụta ụlọ ihe karịa.
graphics.genCompBtnTitle: Mepụta HyperFrames nhazi ọhụrụ site na ihe nkọwa a, nzọpụta ya n'okpụ aha n'usoro 1
graphics.generateFirstWarning: Pịa "Mepụta nhazi" iji wuo nhazi a. Tutu ị na-eme ya, "Mepụta + mepụta" na-ejikọ nhazi họrọ elu na na-agbanwe ihe nkọwa a.
graphics.nameFirstWarning: ↑ nyere ụlọ ihe gị aha n'usoro 1 mbu — ọ na-abụ aha nhazi ọhụrụ.
graphics.newModalFooterHint: Nzọpụta ụlọ ihe na mepụta ya dị ka mp4.
graphics.noTitleSelected: Enweghị ụtọ ọ nahọ — họrọ otu site na ụlọ ihe ndị dị n'akụkụ nri.
graphics.regenBtnTitle: Mepụta ụlọ ihe a karịa site na nhazi nzọpụta na ọkwa nlabada ya
graphics.step1Hint: Ọnọdu mkpọ, na-eji dị ka faịlụ aha. mf. lower_third, scoreboard.
graphics.step2Hint: A "nhazi" bụ ụdị animated — ọ na-ekpebi ebe ederede dị na ka ọ na-amịpụta. Nlele ngosi nhazi ya; ‹TOKENS› na-akọ ebe ederede gị n'usoro 3.
graphics.step3Hint: Ụkọ ndị a na-agbanwe ‹TOKENS› na nhazi. Degara ha, ma ọ bụ ka AI na-ede ndị na-eme ihe site n'ihe ọkọ nke ogidi a.
graphics.thumbClickTitle: Pịa ka eke · legharị ụdị · hụ template + ọkwa
graphics.thumbModalDesc: Mepụta youtube_thumb nhazi na final/{slug}_thumb.png. Ihuajụ ugbu a na-echekwa tupu ọ mepụta.
graphics.writeTextBtnTitle: Ndị ede ederede n'okpụ site n'ihe ọkọ nke ogidi a, n'olu ụdị ụlọ ihe a
graphics.writeThumbBtnTitle: Dee ihuajụ nwere ike na-emegharị nwere ihe ngwa ihe mpaghara (Ollama)
localize.busyOrUnrendered: nyocha ihe ngosi tupu, ma ọ bụ chere ka agbapụta a rụchapụrụ
localize.haikuNote: Maka ntụgharị asụsụ ndị nkịta kacha mma, juo Claude n'igbe terminal - enweghị mgbakọ igwe cloud na ngalaba.
localize.renderFirst: Nyocha ihe ngosi a n'Ọnụ Bekee tupu ihe - nyocha na-ejikarị ihe agbapụta na ihe ngosi, ya mere ọ chọrọ ihe rụchapụrụ.
localize.runningNote: Asụsụ ọ bụla na-agbapụta na queue GPU, otu kwa otu. Ị nwere ike imechi nke a — ọ na-aga n'ihu.
localize.title: Nyocha — ihe ngosi + ụda
log.empty: Enweghị mmemme mma. Toasts na ọkwa na-agbakọ ebe a.
log.title: LOGI MMEMME
metadata.emptyHint: Họrọ video clip ma ọkwa ihe nkiri na ommiri.
metadata.title: METADATA
placeholder.comingSoon: Na-abịa mma. v0.1 na-ebufelie Stage 5 (Assembly) nke oto. Ụdịọrụ ndị ọzọ ga-ada n'ụdịche ndị na-esote.
script.generateTitle: Tụgharịa script.md n'ime manifest cues (lelite na tulee tupu iwe)
script.mergeHelp: Ndiyipụ a ka e nwetere ọzọ site n'aka <0>script.md</0> ma mesuo; olu profaela, onye mmadụ seeds, b-roll, comfyui/style/music na title assets a na-echekwa. Mgbe <1>manifest.json.bak</1> a na-edeghachi tupu inye.
script.modeDiffTitle: Tunyere ụdị ndị a kpasara (ndụ agbakwunyere / uhie wepụtara)
script.noChangesDetail: Script kwụ na manifest — ihe ọbụla na-ede.
script.noDiffChanges: Ewu mgbanwe n'etiti ụdị abụọ ndị a.
script.noVersionsYet: Ewu ndị ụdị a mepụtara. Pị git sync ọnụ ọgụ iji sie ihe ndị a script, mgbe ahụ laghachi tulee.
script.oneVersionOnly: Otu ụdị naanị ({label}). Gụkọ ọzọ mgbe gbanwe gị na-esoro iji nweta iche.
script.renumbered: ⚠ numbachiri ọzọ (VO cache nwere ike guzobe)
script.unmappedHint: Tinye ha na voice.speaker_map (Manifest drawer) ma ọ bụ ndiyipụ ndị ahụ agaghị enweta VO.
settings.comfy.stub: Gbapage checkpoints na ComfyUI server (:8188) ma họrọ ụzọ azụ kwa ihe ngosi. Na-abịa n'ọtụtụ oge.
settings.comfy.title: ComfyUI onye njikwa kọ mmaanụ
settings.git.stub: Hazuo URL ebe ebipụ na alaka Studio synchronized script/manifest/youtube. Ihe ịmụ ọrụ iji isi SSH igwe ndị dị.
settings.lang.help: Gbanwe asụsụ interface. Ga-eyi mma ozugbo ma echikwa na igwe a.
settings.lang.title: Asụsụ
settings.show.name: Ịgị aha
settings.theme.help: Gbanwe isi ihu kasị mma. Ga-eyi mma ozugbo ma echikwa na igwe a.
settings.theme.title: Ihu Color
settings.title: Nzọkọ
sfx.delayTitle: mwere oge nudge — nkeji, akara (− mgbe ochie / + mgbe ọhụụ site na cue anchor)
sfx.helpAgen: Nhaenwu AudioGen → 24 kHz/−3 dBFS na kit · pinned na
sfx.helpMusicNoRender: agaghị agba n'oge ihe a rụrụ
sfx.helpThenDrag: mgbe ahụ draukwu ya site na ọdụ mkpụrụ
sfx.phAgenPrompt: ụdị 'heavy iron door slam, dry, close mic'
sfx.phMusicPrompt: ụdị 'sickly lo-fi big-band waltz, tape hiss, mono'
sfxgen.error.gpuBusy: GPU na-arụ ọrụ — ihe a rụrụ na-agba. Zaa mgbe ọnụ.
sfxgen.gain.label: g
sfxgen.gain.title: ibu ibu — 0–1 linear
sfxgen.idle.body: Gụọ ihe nlụanya dị ka radio play ma nye ihe nkiri, na-akpali kit gị.
sfxgen.idle.hint: Pịa Malite iji malite — spins Ollama na GPU, ~30-60s.
sfxgen.loading.body: Na-arị mma LLM nhaenwu (Qwen2.5-7B) iji gụọ ihe nlụanya dị ka radio play…
sfxgen.review.empty: Enweghị ohere nkiri ndi ihe — nlereanya tụara na ihe nlụanya adịghị mkpa, ma ọ bụ ihe niile edozigasiga na.
sfxgen.review.helpText: Itinye na-atinyebanye ndị a na audio timeline (manifest.sfx[]) dị ka drag-drop — ala-ala oge ala dị n'ụdị ala. Ọdụ mkpụrụ ihe na-egba ozugbo; "iji nweta" ihe bu ndepụta ruo mgbe ị nweta ha (Ọdụ mkpụrụ → Tinye → Freesound) n'okwu aha enwere; ihe a rụrụ wepu ihe ọ bụla na-echeghị na disk na.
sfxgen.section.acquire: MKPA NA-NWETA ({count}) — dezie search, nweta mgbe mgbe site na ọdụ mkpụrụ
sfxgen.section.existing: NA-EJI IHE SFX DỊ NA (ntakiri {count}) — na-ebu na-ebu na kit
sfxgen.title: MEPỤTA SFX NDEPỤTA
sfxgen.toast.applied: SFX ndepụta etinyerenụ — {placed} tinyere ({reused} site na ọdụ mkpụrụ{acq})
shotgen.applyFootnote: Apply overwrites nke cue shots[] na na-edewe new character/b-roll defs. Reused keys weli ole ole cores + seeds
shotgen.emptyAllFilled: Cues nile bu shots na mbụ — enweghị ihe iji jupụta. Uncheck box gara elu iji re-plan episode nile.
shotgen.errorGpuBusy: GPU na-arụ ọrụ — ideo na-arụ ọrụ. Nwalee ka mma na-efu.
shotgen.loadingMain: Na-arịọ local LLM (Qwen2.5-7B) iji chepụtaa shots…
shotgen.onlyMissingTooltip: Na: naanị cues na-enweghị shots (agaghị meta cues ndị a nyapu). Off: re-plan cues nile (overwrites shots na-adị).
shotgen.sectionNewChars: NEW characters — minted (dezie core ma ọ masịrị gị)
shotgen.title: AKPỤ SHOT LIST

tour.assembly.body: Ide dashboard. Na-agba pipelaịn zuru ezu tutu na video kwubiri, na-eme oge na-agbanwe maka ọ bụla oge. Ọ bụ ụdị omume ụkwụ — tụgharịa ya mgbe ihe ọzọ na-acha anya.
tour.assembly.title: Usoro
tour.audio.body: Maka ọ bụla ndiyipụ voiceover — tụrụ ya, mepụta ahịhị ọzọ, na tugbuo mmetụta olu n'ime agagharị n'etiti ndiyipụ.
tour.audio.title: Olu
tour.docs.body: Ndị akọrọ — character bible, prompt nkwadosi, na pipelaịn ederede. Ọmụma, ọ bụghị idezi.
tour.docs.title: Nkwadosi
tour.episodePicker.body: Horo episiọdu; ◀ ▶ arrows na-aga site na ha. Isi isi bụ git-sync steetu — akụkọ na-acha akụkọ pụtara, akụkọ na-acha ụbara pụtara mgbanwe mpaghara.
tour.episodePicker.title: Episiọdu picker
tour.gitSync.body: Nye episiọdu a ederede — script, manifest, youtube.txt — n'ime repo ma sụ ya. Emepụta media nanị mpaghara; otu bụ ụtụtụ nke ezi ezi.
tour.gitSync.title: Git mepu
tour.graphics.body: Kaad isi na ihe ndị ejiokwu na anya. Mepụta kaad ederede na ide ndi ejiokwu na-ụba olu na ike na video.
tour.graphics.title: Ejiokwu
tour.projectMenu.body: Mepụta ma ọ bụ mepụta ihe ngosi na episiọdu, mbanye/iwepụ ọrụ, na ntọhapụ — ihe niile bi ebe a. Studio nwere ike ijide ihe ngosi ọtụtụ ugbu a.
tour.projectMenu.title: Mmepu ọrụ
tour.ready.body: Ị dịkwa ọtụtụ — malite site na ịmepụta ihe ngosi ọhụụ site n'usoro: mepụta mmepu ọrụ ma horo Ihe ngosi ọhụụ…. Mepụta ụka a ógụ ọ bụla site n'otu mmepu → Nkọwa ihe. Ekele.
tour.ready.title: N'ọrụ ihu
tour.script.body: Dee episiọdu n'Markdown, mgbe ahụ pị Mepụta manifest iji tụgharịa ya n'ime ndiyipụ mgbuyọ pipelaịn nwere ike ide.
tour.script.title: Script
tour.video.body: Ndepụta okupu — onye mmadụ na b-roll clip. Ide ihe ndị dị mfụ ma ọ bụ mgbanwegbanwe; lelite ihe ngosi ọ bụla amatara.
tour.video.title: Video
tour.publish.body: Ọnụ njedebe na azụ: wepụta ihe omume ahụ maka netwọk — isiokwu, nkọwa, ihe oyiyi, njikọ vidiọ nke e debere, na onye nwere ike ịhụ ya — mgbe ahụ Bipụta ka ọ ga-ala na mayorawesome.com.
tour.publish.title: Bipụta
update.dirtyWarning: Checkout a na-eju ihe na-enweghị etinyerenụ — auto-update emere ka ọ wepu ndị ha. Tizie ma ọ bụ wepụ ha (ma ọ bụ update site na terminal) tupu nke.
update.idleHint: Pịa "Chọta updates" iji chọta build ọhụụ.
update.gpuBusyBody: Ọ dị ka GPU gị na-arụ ọrụ ({free} MiB na-adị) — agbapụta nwere ike na-agba. Update na-ebu na-amalite Studio, nke nwere ike igbute ọrụ ahụ. Ị chọrọ update na restart ugbu a?
update.phaseBuilding: Rebulding (deps + UI)… nwere ike ịkwa nkeji otu.
update.phaseRestartNeeded: Update rubere. Restart serva nkeonwe iji loodu ya.
update.title: Software update
update.updateHint: "Update & restart" na-adọta, na-ebu UI ọzọ, ma restart sensevis (~1 min). Ihuenyo na-agharịa ozugbo mgbe ọ laghachiri.
versions.promoteTitle: Mụ ụdị nke a ka ndị dị ndụ
video.addShotHelp: Tinye {kind} isi na manifest. Jiri ụja mepụta ya site na NDEPỤTA IHE OYIYI.
video.addShotHelpWithCue: Tinye {kind} isi na manifest na ihe oyiyi na @{cue}. Jiri ụja mepụta ya site na NDEPỤTA IHE OYIYI.
video.emptyManifest: Enweghị ndị ama ihe ma ọ bụ b-roll na manifest.
video.generateShotListTitle: Jiri ihe ọmụmụ dị n'ozekere gosi ihe oyiyi site na script (mezie ndị ama ihe na-eme ugboro ugboro)
video.precacheTitle: Tikọ ndị ihe oyiyi master ederedụ niile n'akwụkwọ ihe, iji mee ka ụkọ ndụ dị njọ karị site na proxy Cloudflare
video.renderAllMissing: Jiri ụja mepụta ndị nọ aghara/ochie
video.seedVersionReadOnly: Ịrị nke ihe ogidi a na-eleba (na-agụ naanị)
voicepicker.castVoicesSubtitle: — mụnye olu na-akpụ n'onye ama ihe
voicepicker.exportVoiceTitle: Akwada nkiti ndị mgbe {name} ozugbo — na-olanye n'igwe ọzọ
voicepicker.noCharacters: Enweghị ndị ama ihe n'ọdị — tinye otu n'okpuru, ma ọ bụ Mepụta manifest iji tụbaa ndị site na script.
voicepicker.omnivoiceStopped: OmniVoice kwụsịrị — akpụ ma ọ bụ jiri ụja mepụta iji lelee olu
youtube.captions.clientHelp: Otu oge: mepụta OAuth client nke ụdị "TVs and Limited Input devices" n'ime Google Cloud project gị (nke nwere YouTube Data API na-emeghe), mgbe ahụ dị nnata ID + secret ya ebe a.
youtube.captions.noTracks: Enweghị egosi sibidiya karị — mee isi ihe a dị iche karị nke mbu.
youtube.captions.noVideo: Enweghị egosi YouTube akwọkwọ maka isi ihe a.
youtube.captions.quotaNote: Bulie ọbụla na-eji ~400 nke YouTube ihe ụbọchị quota (~25 buliri/ụbọchị n'elu ihe ọ kwadoro).
youtube.captions.title: Sibidiya
youtube.captions.waiting: A na-eche maka gị ka ị kwado…
youtube.notConfiguredBody: Tinye API key + channel id na <0>~/.config/macu-studio/youtube.json</0> (ma ọ bụ tinye <1>YOUTUBE_API_KEY</1> / <2>YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID</2>) iji gosi nyere ogụ ntị upload ebe a.
filemenu.macuWebConnectHint: Na mayorawesome.com, meghee ihe ngosi gị → Ihe achọrọ → Connect MACU Studio → Emezu nke n'ụkpụ okwu, detụ ya, ma dan ya ebe a. Ọ na-agbakọta ihe ọzọ na njirimara ịrịakwụ ụgwọ n'otu nzọ.
filemenu.macuWebConnectedHint: Jikọtara na <0>{base}</0>. Ihe omume achọpụtara na-apụ ọha; ndị a na-achọpụta na-apụ mma ma zoba ihe nka. Mgbe ahu Bipụtaghachi.
toast.macuWebCommitted: na-eji nkuzi mma ({files} ihe nka) — tụlee njirimara ịrịakwụ ụgwọ ka ọ tụgharịa
publish.connectHint: Tinye token njikọ gị (Ihe njikọ ihu na mayorawesome.com → Jikọ MACU Studio).
publish.publishHint: Mee mgbako ihe ndị n'elu, mgbe ahụ bipụta iji nyụ ha na saịtị.
publish.ytNoMatch: Enweghị njikọ sanal maka akụkọ episod a.
publish.videoHint: MACU Web adịghị ebukọ vidio — tinye njikọ nke ebe ọ bi (YouTube). Ọ na-atụnyere na ihu episod.
publish.videoPlaceholder: YouTube ID ma ọ bụ URL
publish.thumbNone: Foto egosiri ike adị na-adị — gbaa ogbugbugo ntụrụndụ (ọkwa 5) mụọ.
tour.mcp.title: Wetara onwe gị na-agwa ọrụ AI
tour.mcp.body: MACU Studio bụkwa MACU-server — ihe niile na nzọụkwụ a bụ ngwaọrụ nke ọrụ AI nwere ike ịkpọ. Tụnyere Claude Code ma ọ bụ Claude Desktop na http://localhost:8774/mcp ma ọkwa rụ mma ghọọ okwu otu: dee ihe ọdịnụ, tụnye ụda, mepụta, bipụta. Hụ ndokume Jikọ-ọrụ-maka maka ihe iwu.
wizard.createFailed: enweghị ike ikpụ ihe omume mmanya: {msg}
wizard.serviceDown: Ọrụ nke usoro a chọrọ agaghị aru ọrụ ugbu a. Ị nwere ike ịjụ ya ma laghachi emesia — agwụ gị echekwubago.
wizard.bannerHint: Ọhụrụ maka Studio? Chụkwu ntụrụndụ nkịtị nke kpụtara ihe omume ziri ezi.
wizard.welcome.title: Ka anyị kpụọ ihe omume mụ nke mbu
wizard.welcome.body: Ntụrụndụ a na-akpụ ihe omume ziri ezi na mwu — script, olu, na video ikpeazụ — n'ihe kanyị ịke-ime nkeji iri na ise. Ọ na-amalite site na ikpụ obere ihe omume mmanya n'ihe omume gị dị ugbu a. Ihe ọbụla dị nke a emeghị ka ọrụ ndị ọzọ gị.
wizard.script.title: 1 · Dee script
wizard.script.body: Anyị tinyere obere script mmalite. Ahụ nke ọbụla dị **ISIOKWU:** na-ghọ okwu akọkọ, ahụ ## isi mmalite akụkụ, na okwu » bụ ntụziaka ihe oyiyi. Gụọ ya, gbanwe ahụ ma ọ bụ dee nke gị — mgbe ahụ pịa Generate Manifest (n'ụkọ aka nri) ma Mesuo.
wizard.cast.title: 2 · Horo olu
wizard.cast.body: Onye ọbụla na-asụ asụ chọrọ olu. Mmalite ahu na-aga olu na-adịghị aka — horo olu maka ọbụla na-eji ntụ olu ntụ n'akụkụ isiokwu ha. (Ị nwere ike ịjụ nke a: ndị na-asụ asụ na-adịghị aka na-agbada n'olu robot ndị mmefu.)
wizard.cast.goal: Onye ọbụla na-asụ asụ nwere olu
wizard.renderVo.title: 3 · Rụnye olu omume
wizard.renderVo.body: Ugbu a gbanwee ahụ n'ụda. Jiri "Rụnye ndị naghị ada" ịrụnye ihe omume ọbụla n'otu oge, ma ọ bụ buton rụnye na ihe omume otu, mgbe ahụ pịa egwu iji nụ ya. Nahụ nke a na-agụ ole ọ ka mezu.
wizard.sfx.title: 4 · Mma na egwu (nke mkpọ)
wizard.sfx.body: Tinye ihe obere: mụta olu mma na-enye gị ike ịtụtọ anya titi ya, ma ọ bụ eme egwu akụkụ dị. Usoro a bụ nke mkpọ — jụ ya mgbe ọ bụla ma gawa n'ihu.
wizard.sfx.goal: At least one sound effect placed
wizard.graphics.title: 5 · Ogwe isiokwu (nke mkpọ)
wizard.graphics.body: Ogwe isiokwu na ogwe mpaghara n'ala na-akpụ ebe a site na ntụzịaka HyperFrames. Rụnye otu iji hụ otú o si eyi. Nke mkpọ — jụ ma ọ bụ na ịchọrọ idekwate ya.
wizard.shots.title: 6 · Vidio ihe oyiyi (nke mkpọ)
wizard.shots.body: Usoro vidio na-agbanwee ntụziaka ihe oyiyi gị n'ihe obere vidio na ComfyUI. Jiri "Kpụ ihe oyiyi" iji nye ihe oyiyi, mgbe ahụ rụnye otu. Nke a chọrọ ọrụ GPU — jụ ya ma ọrụ ndị a na-agaghi.
wizard.assemble.title: 7 · Ezochi ihe omume
wizard.assemble.body: Ezochi na-agba usoro ziri ezi — olu, vidio, egwu, ahụmahụ — ma na-agwụ vidio ikpeazụ. Pịa Run ma lelee akwụkwọ dị ndụ. Nke a bụ usoro na-ewe GPU; jụ ya ma ọrụ ndị a na-agaghi ma laghachi emesia.
wizard.publish.title: 8 · Bipụta (ogere ntụrụndụ)
wizard.publish.body: Mgbe ihe omume dị njikere, ị nwere ike ibipụta ya na saịtị MACU Web gị ma jikọta vidio YouTube ebe a. Anyị agaghị bipụta ihe ọbụla n'oge ntụrụndụ — nke a bụ ịka matawali ebe o bi. Lelee gburugburu, mgbe ahụ gawa n'ihu.
wizard.done.title: Nke a bụ usoro ziri ezi!
wizard.done.body: I wepụtara script ruo n'ihe omume emepụtahwo. Site ebe a: mee ihe omume mmanya ka ịchọrọ, malite nke ziri ezi site n'ọgụgụ isi, ma ọ bụ meghee Docs maka ntụziaka miri emi. Ị nwere ike ịmeghee ntụrụndụ a mgbe ọ bụla site n'ọgụgụ isi.
tour.theme.title: Mee ya nke gị
tour.theme.body: Ntọala → Theme (na menu a) na-ege studio ahụ ihu ọhụrụ: amber terminal nwere ụzọ mma ise, buụ na ụdị zuru ezu — Starship, Wasteland, Slate Pro, Movie Palace, Dracula, na Pretty Princess. Mgbanwe na-ewu ngwa ngwa ma a na-echeta ya.
wizard.theme.title: Họrọ ụdị gị
wizard.theme.body: Tupu anyị rụọ ihe ọ bụla, mee studio a nke gị. Meghee menu ihe mgbakwunyere (n'ebe ọtụtụ) → Ntọala → Theme. Pịa ụkọ agba na Terminal ahịrị maka mgbanwe agba ngwa ngwa, maọ bụ gwa ụdị zuru ezu dị ka Starship maọ bụ Movie Palace. Ọ na-akpa ngwa ngwa ma na-echekwa ya na browser a.
wizard.theme.goal: Họrọ theme ọ bụla — maọ bụ jide amber terminal ma gaa n'ihu.
filemenu.archiveEpisodeBody: Wehie <0>{slug}</0>? Nke a na-agbagwa faịlụ episode na ndepụta dị mma ka ọka wehie na diski. Ị nwere ike meghachi ya mgbe ọ bụla site na Nhazi → Wehie.
filemenu.archiveShowBody: Wehie <0>{show}</0> na episiọdu ya niile? Nke a na-agbagwa ihe ngosi dum na ndepụta dị mma ka ọka wehie na diski. Ị nwere ike meghachi ya mgbe ọ bụla site na Nhazi → Wehie.
settings.archive.title: Episiọdu & ihe ngosi wehiere
settings.archive.help: Ihe ndị wehiere agbagwakwaara n'eluigwe mana nọ n'ọka wehie na diski. Meghachi otu ka ọ laghachi.
settings.archive.slugTaken: Slug {slug} ewere onye episode dị mma — họọ nke ọzọ
engines.title: Engine routing
engines.help: Olee n'eziokwu ọrụ na-eme ihe n'ụzọ nke ihe omume. Endpoints bu ihe ụwa nke ndekọrọ; dọt na-egosi ume nke mma ugbu a.
engines.remoteColdStart: Na-asụ asụ MACU render-service API (:8779). Mmalite ntụ ntụ mgbe ọrụ ahụ na-amalite ≈ 70 s (kernel compile).
engines.unreachable: enwetaghị ike ichen — malaite ọrụ ahụ ma ọ bụ lelee URL
engines.envOverrideTip: Jikọtara site na ihe mgbagwoju anya (.env / systemd) — nkọwa ejipụtara na-azọ anya ka e ji akụkụ ya.
settings.hf.title: Higgsfield.ai akaụntụ
settings.hf.help: Jikọ akaụntụ Higgsfield.ai gị ka ịmepụta video shot, foto ihe omume, na mkpọ lip-synced n'igwe ojii. Eji Higgsfield subscription plan gị na credits.
settings.hf.pasteToggle: Ọ nọ na-asị nke ọma? Dò redirect URL
settings.hf.pasteHelp: Ọ bụrụ na sign-in peeji na-ewe na peeji enwetaghị ike ichen mgbe ejiri gụọ ya, detuo peeji ahụ n'ụzọ zuru ezu site na address bar ma dò ya ebe a.
settings.hf.refreshModels: Mee ka katalọgu ihe omume mma ọzọ
settings.hf.modelsRefreshed: Katalọgu ihe omume meme mma ọzọ ({n} models)
settings.hf.modelsHelp: Ihe omume dị mma n'akaụntụ gị. Tọrọ nke otu shot na Video → Weta Shot (kind: higgsfield / lipsync). 👄 = anụkwu kpọmkwem mkpọ tupu (ewetaghị ike ijikọ maka lipsync).
settings.hf.modelsFailed: anapụghị ike ilọta katalọgu ihe omume
settings.hf.lipsyncCapable: Anụkwu mkpọ tupu — ewetaghị ike ijikọ maka lipsync shot
update.setupTitle: Achọrọ step setup mgbe otu nanị
update.setupIntro: Onye na-ememe ka ọzọ enwetaghị ike ịga nso n'ihe a n'onwe ya (ọ pụtaghị iji sudo). Sitere na macu-pipeline folder, tulee onyenri ndị a — ./deploy/install.sh bu ihe oké nkita iji tupu mọ ọzọ ma bukwata ihe ọhụrụ kwa:
update.noticeIntro: Ị nwere ike ịchọ site na otu piko. Tupu ị mara:
video.cloudChipTitle: Higgsfield cloud shot: ọnụ, akwadoro credits maka shot ndị na-edola, na balanse gị. Crop/trim edits oghị ụtụ mgbe ọzọ.
video.cloudChipIdleTitle: Higgsfield jikọtara. Weta cloud shot site + Weta Shot (kind: higgsfield ma ọ bụ lipsync); akwadoro ọnụ ga-apụta ebe a.
video.cloudChipDisconnectedTitle: Higgsfield cloud vidiyo ntụ ntụ — jikọ akaụntụ gị na Settings → Higgsfield iji jiri ya.
video.kindLipsync: Lipsync shot (mkpọ-ọdụ ọrụ site na VO nke cue)
video.fieldSourceStillPh: key ihe omume ma ọ bụ footpath foto (i2v)
video.cloudNeedsCue: Cloud shot achọrọ ijikọ na cue
video.addShotHelpCloud: Emepụta shot a n'igwe ojii site na Higgsfield (ụtụ maka ntụ ntụ; lelee ☁ akwadoro). Manu ihe omume maka episode default. Photo isinye na-eme ka ọ bụ video-to-video.
video.addShotHelpLipsync: Dodozie mgba shot nke cue ya na ONE lipsync shot: foto ihe omume ka ọ na-asụ asụ VO nke cue. Achọrọ foto isinye; VO karị ~12s gburupụ na akwasị na-akwasị ebe ọ tụrụ.
timeline.lipsyncSolo: Cue {cue} nwere lipsync shot — ọ gaghị enwe ike nọ n'ihe ndị ọzọ na cue ya (mkpọ na-ekpuchi ogologo VC).
timeline.shotCloudTip: piko iji emere crop/trim · kwudọ iji kwuo
metadata.shotEditHint: Crop, trim, na jank ka akụkụ site na nchebe mkpọ — ịmeme ememe ha na-akọchapụ na-enwetaghị ụtụ Higgsfield credits.
assembly.costError: Akwadoro enwetaghị ike: {msg}. Ị ga-enwe ike ntụ ntụ — cloud shot na-edola ga-ụtụ akaụntụ gị.
assembly.costInsufficient: Akwadoro ọnụ karịrị balanse credit gị. Ntụ ntụ nwere ike imekpụ ọnụ (shot ọ bụla rụrụ nọ na nchebe).
assembly.costUnknowns: {n} shot nwere ọnụ ajụtachataghị (lelee ndị a n'elu) — ụzọ na-abụ ihe nta.
script.styleGuideTitle: Otu asụsụ parser gị na-agụ script gị — mepee Docs tab
tour.characters.title: Ọmụmụ ihe omume
tour.characters.body: Ndị ike ihe omume nke egwu gị: mee foto isinye (mpaghara site na ComfyUI, na Higgsfield, ma ọ bụ igwe ntụ ntụ dị anya), mgbe ahụ, webata ndị ihe omume na episodes maka video-to-video na lipsync shot.
characters.empty: Enwetaghị ndị ihe omume - mee otu, ma ọ bụ weta site na episode a ga-aga.
characters.fieldCorePh: eji video shot mgbe shot enwetaghị prompt nke ya
characters.fieldStillPromptPh: mma foto nke 1970s news anchor na broadcast desk… (kele ntụ ntụ n'okpuru)
characters.noTakes: Enwetaghị take - tọrọ prompt foto ma piko Generate.
characters.genPromptPh: hapụ na-efu iji jiri prompt foto
characters.usage.no_still: n'ihe esi eme, enwetaghị foto faịl
characters.useHelp: Detuo take a n'episode nke gị stills/ na jikọ ihe omume na manifest ya. Foto ka e were de ka e me megide, kaya ihe ana-ụtụ oghị ụtụ.
characters.useConfirm: Episode a nwere ihe omume dị iche na foto a kwa.
characters.useInvalidates: Ịgbanwu ya na-eme {n} cloud shot e kwatụtara {shots} — ga-ụTỤ OZỌ na ntụ ntụ na-esote: {shots}
characters.importTitle: Weta ndị ihe omume site na episode
characters.importHelp: Ịmalite ọmụmụ site na episode manifest ihe omume (prompts + foto ndị dị na-abụ take-001). Ndị ihe omume ndị dị na ọmụmụ ka amapụ.
video.stillNone: Enwetaghị foto - mee ihe omume na emepụta takes na Characters tab.
engines.claude.title: Claude Code
engines.claude.help: Jikọ agent na Studio MCP server nke a, ma ọ bụ kele ihe ndeta script (shot lists, SFX plans, card maama) site na Claude subscription gị — enwetaghị model mpaghara achọrọ.
engines.claude.textgenHint: Tip: tọrọ Script tools n'elu ka "Claude Code" iji mepụta shot lists na Claude subscription gị kwa — nkea dị mma na instaleshọ nta, na ọ na-agagharịgharị GPU.
sync.title: Sync — {show}
sync.help: Na-akọ akọ ihe ndeta maama nke show (scripts, manifests, docs, character records) na Studio installs gị na macu-web jikọ. Binaries (takes, stills, clips, voices) gaa site Import/Export n'ihe.
sync.clean: Ihe nile dị ebe ọ̀ ({n} failụ).
sync.conflictHelp: Ngalaba ndị tụrụ aka nke failụ ọ bụla echekwara mpaghara dika timestamped .bak n'akụkụ ihe mbụ.
sync.nothingDone: Ihe ọ bụla adịghị achọrọ sync.
sync.notConnected: Ajikọtaghị na macu-web. Jikọ na Publish peeji — Studio abụọ gaghị eji ihe jikọ — mgbe ahụ sync.
tour.sync.title: Mekọ
tour.sync.body: Otu click na-agba ụkwụ ka ederede show a — skriptụ, manifests, docs, character records — na connectionụ web gị, n'abụọ: o na-eme ka ọ pụta na ihe ịpụ na ihe ị dị na kpọkọ n'onwe ya. Generated media na-anọ n'ụlọ; kwụ ihe ahụ iji Import / Export mula na menu projectụ.
tour.cloud.title: Gumemi na igwe
tour.cloud.body: Ọ bụ na i chọrọ mmetụta video video karị, maọbụ na-agba mma na mbubata ọkụ na-enweghị heavy GPU? Project menu → Settings → Higgsfield na-ejikọ akaụntụ Higgsfield.ai gị, wee Settings → Engines na-ebutu stills, video, maọbụ lipsync na igwe. O na-eji krediti gị n'onwe ya, na-echekwa shot ọ bụla ka i nagbakwa kwa, ma na-anọ ọzọ nhọpụta.
wizard.characters.title: Ruo na-ememe cast gị (ọzọ)
wizard.characters.body: Mepe Characters tab na bar elu iji nye cast gị na-amekarị ihe eji anya — "takes" — emepụtara n'ụlọ maọbụ na igwe. Star ịri na-atụ anya ma were character banye na episode ka ha lepụ otu ihe na shot ọ bụla. Ọzọ, mana o na-eme ka show gị na-adị mma.
wizard.characters.goal: Character nwere ihe karị otu take
